prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: MCN-WASHINREPELLENT-GAL-AMZ Product Type: COAT Brand (from catalog): GEAR AID Existing Title: GEAR AID Wash-in Water Repellent, Concentrated Formula for Outerwear, 1 Gallon Description: "Restore or add durable water repellency (DWR) to several outdoor garments at once with
Revivex Wash-In Water Repellent. Treat ski and rain gear with this concentrated water repellent all season long. As a fluorocarbon-free formula it's effective to use on all high-performance gear including GORE-TEX jackets and pants. Just add one ounce per garment to your sink or washing machine and do not rinse garments after treatment. Tumble dry for maximum effectiveness. Outerwear will shed water without impacting breathability. With Revivex Wash-In Water Repellent it's easy to stay warm and dry.

" Search Terms: pro cleaner jacket for clothes washer revivex por sleeping bag rain and down concentrate comforter coat Features: - Restore DWR to Multiple Garments: Restore DWR to multiple garments simultaneously to keep ski and rain gear repelling water and snow all season long with this concentrated formula - Fluorocarbon-Free Formula: Shed water like new with a fluorocarbon-free wash for technical gear including soft shells and fleece; 10 fl oz pouch treats 10 jackets - Wash-In Application: Protect outerwear and gloves with no insulation or lining with this wash-in formula; air dry or heat set in the dryer - Maintains Breathability: Add water repellency without inhibiting performance of waterproof-breathable garments including GORE-TEX jackets and pants - Concentrated 1 Gallon Size: This 1 gallon concentrated formula provides enough treatment for multiple garments throughout the entire season === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: GEAR AID Wash-In Water Repellent, 1 Gallon Concentrated

anthropic.title_differentiation: Fluorocarbon-Free, Restores DWR, Treats Multiple Garments, GORE-TEX Compatible, Maintains Breathability

openai.title_differentiation: Restores DWR, Fluorocarbon-Free Formula, Treats Multiple Garments, Maintains Breathability, For GORE-TEX Jackets And Pants
